title: Dalton Prepares to Resist
description: On pages 16–19, dalton prepares to resist as wapol comes back to reclaim his kingdom as Luffy, Sanji, and Nami prepare for the dangerous climb toward Dr. Kureha.
scene: Dalton Prepares to Resist. Wapol comes back to reclaim his kingdom as Luffy, Sanji, and Nami prepare for the dangerous climb toward Dr. Kureha. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stay still while I make a small incision.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: GYAAA.A!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Shouldn't you be using Anaesth- Etics!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now for a shot.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're killing my boy!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: My drugs are quite effective so this is enough for his treatment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just tie some bandages tightly around his leg after- wards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He'll feel much better once the cast hardens.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: oh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As for my payment... Ah, that's right. I was running low on garbage bags and toilet paper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What else... some food, rum, and... 50% of all the money you have.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: carry these out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You're taking 50% of my money!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't let her con you! What's all this bull about the kid being on the verge of death!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He was probably only crying because he tripped or something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You think we don't know any better just because you're a doctor and we're not!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ain't that right!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You're just taking advantage of people's weaknesses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You 140 Year-Old Senile Hag!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop it, chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're nothing but brats who don't know any better.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GRANY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I feel much better now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thank you very much.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Heehee Heehee!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: That was a nice little gift.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Fine, I'll lower it to just 49%.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll... I'll pay the money... thank you, doctor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee he

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Don't you forget,

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: About that sense of happiness just now!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: NAAAAHHH!!! There's a baby monster ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Grab your brush! We're gonna fight! Usopp gallery Pirates!!

summary: This part centers on dalton prepares to resist, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
